name: Fishing World Map
aboutText: Fishing World Map marks fishing spots around the world — riverbanks and lake shores, piers, sea marks and managed fisheries — so anglers can see where there's water worth a cast.

Each spot comes from OpenStreetMap's `leisure=fishing` tag, added by anglers and local clubs. Licences, seasons and rules differ everywhere, so always check the local regulations before you fish a new spot.
